nodes.name: REDEFINED 2026-06-23 (deep HR council, owner constraint: no human but the owner). Renamed from a 'stranger test' (a label that claimed a de-biased human signal it never had) to a MECHANICAL BOOT-CONFORMANCE gate: satisfied when `run.sh --live` shows Layer-0 boot-friction green AND every reached task passes the FABRICATION-HARDENED grader (>=3 reached) AND PR-T0-bootflow (the my-axon-gate halt) is resolved. The author satisfies this by running the benchmark — the naive AI is the subject, not a human. HONEST ADMISSION (written per the adversary seat): under 'no human but the owner', the non-author DESIRE/abandonment signal is UNOBTAINABLE (an instruction-follower complies where a human quits; the author cannot un-know AXON's idiom). We are NOT measuring it and we accept we are blind to whether a stranger would WANT to continue. The desire half is DROPPED as a blocker (see PR-014).
nodes.label: boot-conformance gate (was 'stranger')
nodes.disposition: Mechanical half is AXON-satisfiable (run the hardened benchmark). Desire half honestly dropped, not faked.
